policy: Public release audit summaries are tracked as commands and expected evidence only. Runtime logs, private harnesses, local state, credentials, and generated artifacts stay ignored.

summaries.expected_evidence: All third-party GitHub Actions refs are pinned to 40-character commit SHAs and default workflow token permissions stay read-only.
summaries.artifact_policy: stdout summary only; do not commit workflow logs or downloaded artifacts.

summaries.expected_evidence: Each advisory exception has an owner, future expiry, substantive mitigation, and matching cargo-audit or cargo-deny config entry.
summaries.artifact_policy: stdout summary only; cargo advisory database caches remain local.

summaries.expected_evidence: Runtime Rust code only calls bincode through the named legacy compatibility codec boundary.
summaries.artifact_policy: stdout summary only; no generated codec reports are committed.

summaries.expected_evidence: Runtime and release-tool dependencies install with --require-hashes, the SDK wheel builds without isolation, pip check passes, and pip-audit reports no known runtime vulnerabilities.
summaries.artifact_policy: Temporary venvs and wheels are created under the OS temp directory and removed by the QA script.

summaries.expected_evidence: Redacted validator, custody, and faucet env examples match the systemd EnvironmentFile, inline environment, and deploy/setup.sh generated-key contracts while keeping live credential values out of tracked templates.
summaries.artifact_policy: stdout summary only; filled env files, secret-manager exports, and host-specific copies remain untracked operator material.

summaries.expected_evidence: A live local validator RPC reports healthy chain identity, monotonic slots, canonical block hashes and state roots, validator-count consistency, and expected genesis symbol registry entries.
summaries.artifact_policy: stdout summary only; local validator state remains under ignored data directories.

summaries.expected_evidence: Live local RPC and CLI commands complete without failed endpoint wiring, transport, or command-surface regressions.
summaries.artifact_policy: Legacy shell fallbacks may write /tmp summaries; do not move those outputs into tracked paths.
